commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Judah also shall fight at Jerusalem; and the wealth of all the nations round about shall be gathered together, gold, and silver, and apparel, in great abundance. Even Juda The carnal Jews, and other false brothers, shall join in persecuting the Church. (Challoner) The Jews showed themselves the most virulent, 2 Corinthians xi. , and Acts viii. They insisted on the death of St. Converts showed their generosity so much, (Calmet) that Julian and Felix, apostates, complained of this profusion in sacred vessels.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Even Juda: The carnal Jews, and other false brothers, shall join in persecuting the church.
